title: Active Travel England: annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This report provides a comprehensive account of Active Travel England’s use of resources between 1 April 2024 and 31 March 2025.  It sets out the activities of Active Travel England during this period and provides detailed information on:   our financial performance and position how we used our resources our strategy and achievements over the period our objectives our governance arrangements  "
